title: Mineplant (Canopy Integration)
description: This mod connects directly to the Canopy platform, allowing your in-game actions to earn points that contribute to real-world reforestation efforts. Install the Canopy app, hop into Minecraft, and start completing tasks to grow your forest.
body:
https://ovv.gg/canopy

## About the app
This mod connects directly to the Canopy platform, allowing your in-game actions to earn points that contribute to real-world reforestation efforts. Install the Canopy app, hop into Minecraft, and start completing tasks to grow your forest.

 

### Key Features:
- Requires the Canopy app (via Overwolf)
- Earn points just for existing in Minecraft, for things like:
  - Placing blocks
  - Taking damage
  - Using tools
  - Sleeping
  - etc.
- Points sync automatically with your Canopy account
- Every 750 points plants a real tree through tree-nation.com
- Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.20.5

Regular updates are planned for future Minecraft versions. **Missing a version?** Let us know, we'll add it!
